exit_criteria.check: plan.md contains ## Files section with at least one file path
plan.md contains ## Rules Applied section with at least one rule_id pattern matching [A-Z]+-[A-Z]+-[0-9]+ or 'No matching rules' declaration
plan.md contains ## Capabilities section with at least one checkbox item
files_written in session is superset of plan.md file list
analysis_results in session has no fail entries for planned files
at least one test file in files_written
every public method in planned source files has at least one test method referencing it (name-based heuristic)
test files reference at least one rule_id from loaded_rules (comment or method name)
